data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an alternative link if the primary link fails. However, the evidence provided in the linked use case does not mention any mechanism for generating an alternative link in case the primary Zoom link fails. The absence of this functionality indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the specific need for an alternative link is explicitly stated but not addressed in the evidence.
gaps: No alternative link provided if primary Zoom link fails.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
